questions.text: Can we get an upgraded plan for Smartsheet?

questions.text: How can I see what scopes an OAuth application has? Auditboard is asking for Bitbucket

questions.text: Hii I'm configuring Rippling partner portal for a customer and noticed the scopes look a little different (workers instead of employees). I believe Rippling had migrated their endpoints, but curious if we are supposed to still be selecting endpoints or if there was an update/discussion on this change?
questions.rationale: Requires up-to-date partner migration knowledge and internal discussion.

questions.text: Do they roughly map 1->1 to the old ones?
questions.rationale: Mapping details could exist in migration docs if maintained.

questions.text: are we good to proceed with the REST API scopes?
questions.rationale: Needs internal confirmation on approved integration approach.

questions.text: tagging Pritak Patel can you help?
questions.rationale: Simple person tag requiring human response.

questions.text: Is there a Hibob developer portal acct I could use to create an Agent Handler OAuth app? If you received a verification link for Hibob that was me lol Pritak Patel
questions.rationale: Requires provisioning shared dev portal account by human.

questions.text: can he get us an intro with their team first
questions.rationale: Relationship coordination needing human involvement.

questions.text: Adding in Marcos Placona!! Who should be included in the intro?
questions.rationale: Requires human judgment on stakeholders for intro.

questions.text: can you do this in the gateway marketing channel
questions.rationale: Simple coordination/action instruction, human handled.

questions.text: could it be a bug in Merge Link?
questions.rationale: Diagnosing a bug requires investigation and engineering input.

questions.text: Is it not that we're hitting rate limits?
questions.rationale: Rate limit checks documentable, but may need log review.

questions.text: I can't tell if this competes with us but have you spoken w/ folks on their side about this recently?
questions.rationale: Competitive analysis requires human strategic judgment.

questions.text: oh damn ty, what makes it not competitive?
questions.rationale: Nuanced competitive reasoning needs human context.

questions.text:
Hello, AON mentioned that Paylocity is asking some of their customers to fill out an additional form (on top of the Web Services form) called "Paylocity Automate Data Exchange / API" (adding a copy in the thread). Have we seen this before, or do we know when/why Paylocity might require it?
It seems like this adds an extra step to obtaining Paylocity API credentials, so I wanted to check whether we're aware of it and whether we should proactively flag it to other customers working with Paylocity. Pritak Patel Nishka Chotai -- do you have any context here or do we have a good contact to reach out to?
questions.rationale: New partner process needs investigation and internal context.

questions.text: have not seen this before! Do they need to talk to someone?
questions.rationale: Requires human knowledge of who to contact.

questions.text: Pritak Patel it's probably a long shot, but have we helped other customers negotiate Paylocity's API fees in the past?
questions.rationale: Historical negotiation experience needs human recollection and judgment.

questions.text: Pritak Patel I received a question from a customer about MPOP and they shared the attached doc. Screenshotting/highlighting the relevant portion. The question is do we need to take any action to get the MPOP credits approved or is it automatic?
questions.rationale: Requires partner-specific program knowledge and doc interpretation.

questions.text: It should be automatic. Kevin Zhang do you know how the MPOPP gets applied to our private offers?
questions.rationale: Specific internal marketplace private-offer mechanics; needs named person's knowledge.

questions.text: Hi team, did we learn more from Tackle about the process?
questions.rationale: Requires status update from ongoing partner conversation.

questions.text: When does the renewal need to ship by?
questions.rationale: Depends on specific deal context not in docs.

questions.text: Do we have any updates here, would love to get the MPPO shipped this week.
questions.rationale: Needs current internal status update.

questions.text: Pritak Patel Nishka Chotai it looks like our teamtailor sandbox no longer works – think we might have to reach out to our contact to unblock it. do you have a contact we can use?
questions.rationale: Requires specific vendor contact info held by team.

questions.text: thanks nishka, am i good to reach out directly?
questions.rationale: Approval question requiring human judgment on process.

questions.text: can u ask them to create one then
questions.rationale: Directive to a colleague, no doc answers it.

questions.text: can i loop in either of you again lol
questions.rationale: Casual internal coordination request.

questions.text: Pritak Patel Nishka Chotai - do either of you know what the Teamtailor account name/link is? Sarah is saying merge.dev isn't working and we can't just send the email address?
questions.rationale: Needs specific account details from teammates.

questions.text: sarah sent me a new sandbox so i made a new login, should i replace the login info in the 1pass we have?
questions.rationale: Credential-storage convention could be documented in playbook.

questions.text: Having trouble logging in, should i email posthog support?
questions.rationale: Standard troubleshooting/escalation path can be documented.

questions.text: is it working for you?
questions.rationale: Real-time peer check, no static answer.

questions.text: weird did the login page look different yesterday?
questions.rationale: Vague observation needing peer confirmation.

questions.text: Should I reach out to the rep to get access?
questions.rationale: Access-request process could be documented in FAQ.

questions.text: Yash Gogri Max Eagle can we use it just for testing our connector?
questions.rationale: Permission/scope question needing named contacts' judgment.

questions.text: Pritak Patel Chloe Leblanc Nishka Chotai sounds like I can generate a project for your use case and add you as members - sound like a plan?
questions.rationale: Coordination confirmation between people.

questions.text: Chloe Leblanc did you end up testing in some other account / environment?
questions.rationale: Requires colleague's specific testing status.

questions.text: are we still trying to pursue a partnership with iCIMS Pritak Patel Nishka Chotai?
questions.rationale: Strategic status question needing internal knowledge.

questions.text: Do we have a technical support contact at ADP WFN? cc: Matt Linehan Pritak Patel Nishka Chotai
questions.rationale: Needs specific partner contact info from team.

questions.text: yeah whats the question?
questions.rationale: Conversational clarification, no answerable content.

questions.text: We're currently trying to generate Employee Deduction records for payroll runs/checks. Are there any fields that indicate whether a deduction is an employee or employer deduction?
questions.rationale: API schema field question answerable from documentation.

questions.text: do we need to reach out to someone else at adp?
questions.rationale: Depends on internal contact knowledge.

questions.text: A client is asking: do you know the licensing model of ADP workforce now? does it charge on API consumption? Pritak Patel you know anything about this?
questions.rationale: Vendor licensing model potentially documented publicly or in FAQ.

questions.text: Like as a product?
questions.rationale: Conversational clarification fragment.

questions.text: or as a partner?
questions.rationale: Conversational clarification fragment.

questions.text: so annual fee + fee for every linked account?
questions.rationale: Pricing question answerable from a documented fee schedule or FAQ.

questions.text: ok thanks for checking, should we take this down from default creds for now?
questions.rationale: Requires human decision on security action, needs context and approval.

questions.text: Hi team! BlackBaud just connected their first Hibob account and only saw this. I thought that for new linked accounts we were going to only show OAuth. Can we confirm that?
questions.rationale: Requires confirming internal rollout policy and account behavior with team.

questions.text: can you add me??
questions.rationale: Vague access request needing human to grant permission.

questions.text: whose number ends in [redacted] for the uber account MFA?
questions.rationale: Sensitive PII lookup, requires human verification and access.

questions.text: can we change it
questions.rationale: No context on what 'it' refers to; unanswerable alone.

questions.text: PartnerBot who is our contact at uber?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from a maintained partner contacts database.

questions.text: Hi all, does anyone know the current status of support for Sage CRE? I had a ticket come through asking about if we have any plans. I saw there was some mention of Sage CRE 300 suggesting talks were progressing early last year but not finding much info since. Was it dropped?
questions.rationale: Requires internal roadmap knowledge; status unclear and unrecorded.

questions.text: Which agent store?
questions.rationale: Too little context to identify what's being asked.

questions.text:
Hey subteam Yash Gogri — inbound from EmpirioLabs asking to be listed as a provider on the Merge Gateway.
My take is we should not do a named listing since it's effectively gateway-on-gateway, which adds complexity (routing/latency, support ownership, observability). Does that match your view?
questions.rationale: Strategic judgment call requiring team alignment on architecture tradeoffs.

questions.text: Maybe he will know how to navigate this?
questions.rationale: No referent for 'he' or 'this'; not answerable.

questions.text: Can we reach out to him?
questions.rationale: Requires human decision on outreach; ambiguous referent.

questions.text: To be clear on the ask- we are trying to enable a feature in netsuite?
questions.rationale: Clarifying request needing context on specific feature and setup.

questions.text: The activity codes specifically?
questions.rationale: Fragment lacking context; unclear system and intent.

questions.text: PartnerBot do we have a workday contact?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from partner contacts database.

questions.text: Hi! A customer was asking if their existing linked accounts will get disconnected with Hibob marketplace migration. My understanding (based on this thread but not sure if anything has changed since) is existing basic-auth linked accounts are expected to keep working for a period before needing relink. Just wanted to confirm if that is the best thing to respond with for now?
questions.rationale: Needs current migration policy confirmation, may have changed.

questions.text: PartnerBot who is our contact at Freshdesk or Freshservice?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from partner contacts database.

probably worth having partnerships/eng reach out?

questions.text: do we have a Justworks contact who we can reach out to & get some insight for this?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from partner contacts database.

questions.text: We do!! Try asking partner bot?
questions.rationale: Statement redirecting, not a question needing answer.

questions.text: PartnerBot do we have a Justworks contact who can help with this issue?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from partner contacts database.

questions.text: Nishka Chotai Prad Biswas could either of you add me to the shared slack channel?
questions.rationale: Simple access grant requiring human action.

questions.text: PartnerBot can you add Krista's contact into to our Partnerships contacts lists?
questions.rationale: Data entry task a bot with write access could perform.

questions.text: PartnerBot do we have a contact at employment hero?
questions.rationale: Contact lookup answerable from partner contacts database.

questions.text:
do we happen to have a recent consolidated OAuth app tracker that shows which integrations across Unified API and which AH connectors have Merge default credentials available for customer use, versus which require the end user to provide their own credentials?
similar to this Partner Auth Audit, but perhaps as a new sheet or column on the Partnership & Sandbox Tracker
questions.rationale: Requires compiling internal tracker data across integrations; human curation needed.

questions.text: Kevin Silberblatt (Silbs) Do you remember the remaining steps here?
questions.rationale: Vague context-dependent question needing specific person's memory.

questions.text: Can you list one or a few customers for me just for tracking?
questions.rationale: Ambiguous scope; needs internal data access and human judgment.

questions.text: Whats included in that, and do we have a list of customers that have mentioned needing?
questions.rationale: Missing referent; unclear what 'that' means without context.

questions.text:
Nishka Chotai Prad Biswas Do we have examples of Merge customers that use our Workday integration, and were then able to become Workday Preferred Partners with us powering the integration?
A prospect of mine wants to ensure that using a Merge powered integration doesn't impede them to being a UKG and/or Workday partner?
questions.rationale: Needs case examples and partnership policy knowledge; human insight required.

questions.text: Jemma Baus iirc FirstUp did and you may have other customers who have, right?
questions.rationale: Person-directed recall question; not documentable.

questions.text: Any idea if its the same using Merge to power the integration vs. them building direct to get a partnership?
questions.rationale: Policy comparison could be documented in partnership FAQ.

questions.text: Hmm how does workday approve the integration?
questions.rationale: Process explainable via documentation if maintained.

questions.text: Sg sg - is UKG any different?
questions.rationale: Comparison documentable but needs vendor-specific detail.

questions.text: Sry Jemma Baus quick follow up - but is it the same process for UKG?
questions.rationale: Process question answerable from partner docs.

questions.text: Apologies if there's an existing thread already, what is the latest on where we stand in the app review process?
questions.rationale: Real-time status needs human or live tracker.

questions.text: Shensi Ding knows their CEO I think. Do you think we can just ask them?
questions.rationale: Judgment/relationship decision, not documentable.

questions.text: whats the acccount under?
questions.rationale: Vague reference; needs CRM lookup and context.

questions.text: <@U0BBLFYHDFG|PartnerBot> Do customers need their own Slack partnership?
questions.rationale: Policy question answerable via FAQ or bot.

questions.text: <@U0BBLFYHDFG|PartnerBot> <@U0BETHXAKFS|Connector Bot> are you a drake fan?
questions.rationale: Trivial non-work banter directed at bot.

questions.text: <@U0BBLFYHDFG|PartnerBot> what Default app credentials do we have for Google product connectors?
questions.rationale: Bot could answer from credentials tracker data.

questions.text: What connectors do they need?
questions.rationale: Ambiguous referent; needs customer-specific context.

questions.text: Grace Park what scope do they want added?
questions.rationale: Person-directed, context-specific; needs human input.

questions.text: Nishka Chotai can you a pass here at investigating?
questions.rationale: Direct task delegation to individual, not automatable.
